purpose: Shinobi is an autonomous Windows-native agent designed for Spanish-speaking YouTubers to research and create briefs for channel formats.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Documentation explaining the purpose and usage of the project.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Project metadata including dependencies, scripts, and entry points.

key_files.name: tsconfig.json
key_files.role: TypeScript configuration for compilation settings.

concerns: No tests specified in package.json.
The README suggests editing the .env file, but there's no example provided.
License mentioned as ISC in README but MIT in package.json, inconsistency.
Development setup requires user actions that could be automated.
No clear instructions on how to run end-to-end tests.

purpose: A continuous watcher that polls GitHub releases for the Hermes repo and notifies users of new releases.

key_files.name: hermes_watcher.ts
key_files.role: Main functionality for checking and notifying new releases

key_files.name: hermes_watcher.test.ts
key_files.role: End-to-end tests for hermes_watcher functionality

concerns: No tests for concurrent access to state file.
State file loading can fail silently and return null values.
No error handling for JSON parsing when loading state.
Potential race conditions in file access with notify functionality.
Environment variable HERMES_WATCH_REPO can default to unsafe repo if not set.

purpose: Contains detailed subreports related to the audit of the AngelReml/Shinobibot repository, focusing on its architecture and security risks.
concerns: Lack of a unified testing strategy across various components increases risk of undetected vulnerabilities.
High-risk vulnerabilities identified in 'dot-prop' with inadequate edge case testing.
Inconsistent README.md files can lead to improper project setup and exploitation.
Hardcoded paths in scripts could lead to failures or vulnerabilities in different environments.
Pending validation of Cloudflare email routing poses a risk of information exposure.

purpose: Contains test scripts for validating the functionality of the LLM mock and self report generation.

key_files.name: a3_smoke.ts
key_files.role: Tests parseReadArgs function.

key_files.name: a4_run.ts
key_files.role: Runs read functionality across multiple repositories.

key_files.name: b1_diff_run.ts
key_files.role: Tests self report differentiation.

key_files.name: b1_run.ts
key_files.role: Executes self report generation.

key_files.name: b1_smoke.ts
key_files.role: Tests parseSelfArgs function.

concerns: All tests should be verified for accuracy and completeness.
Running tests depends on the existence of appropriate files in the specified directories.
No error handling in cases where JSON files cannot be read in a4_run.ts.
Temporary directories created in b1_smoke.ts may need cleanup if exceptions occur before deletion.
Ensure consistency in report data structures generated across tests.

purpose: Documentation for the Shinobi project, covering identity, ecosystem architecture, roadmap, state, and pending technical tasks.

key_files.name: 00_identity.md
key_files.role: Outlines the identity and operational rules for the project leader.

key_files.name: 01_ecosystem.md
key_files.role: Describes the ecosystem architecture and components of the Shinobi project.

key_files.name: 02_roadmap.md
key_files.role: Details the project roadmap divided into three parallel axes.

key_files.name: 03_state.md
key_files.role: Presents the current operational state and confirmed functionalities.

key_files.name: 04_pending.md
key_files.role: Lists technical tasks that are pending or completed.

concerns: Multiple pending tasks need manual intervention for completion.
Cloudflare Turnstile detection issues remain unresolved and outside current scope.
No posts have been published on LinkedIn as per roadmap specifications.
Validation of the agent through real missions has not yet been executed.
Filtering constraints for LinkedIn results need to be refined to avoid false positives.

purpose: Aggregates various artifacts, missions, demos, skills, and reports related to design patterns and AI workflows.

key_files.name: artifacts/youtube/y1_channel_urls.json
key_files.role: Contains a list of YouTube channel URLs.

key_files.name: artifacts/youtube/y1_raw.json
key_files.role: Holds a raw output of a YouTube search query.

key_files.name: missions/2026-05-06T06-42-53-652Z_p12_patterns/meta.json
key_files.role: Defines mission parameters and analysis.

key_files.name: missions/2026-05-06T06-42-53-652Z_p12_patterns/report.json
key_files.role: Summarizes the educational purposes and architecture of design patterns.

key_files.name: demos/full-self-improve-2026-05-04T09-23-04-525Z.transcript.txt
key_files.role: Transcription of a demo regarding self-improvement tasks.

concerns: No direct tests noted for various modules and functionalities in patterns.
Some design patterns documentation may lack comprehensive examples.
Missing test coverage for certain core classes as mentioned in reports.
Documentation might not be up to date with the latest implementations.
Potential issues with outdated YouTube links in the artifact files.
